section1.title: One Security
section1.subtitle: Every new skill is a step forward toward success.
section1.descriptionLineOne: Being compliant means protecting the people who work with you.

section2.title: Share your review with us
section2.description: Fill out the form to share your experience. Your review will be visible after approval.

includeItems: Initial consultancy and analysis of the current situation

servicesLanding.bannerDescription: Explore our services and contact us

sevCourses.bannerDescription: Consultancy for the Seveso directive on the prevention of major accidents
sevCourses.description: Courses designed to help companies and operators subject to Legislative Decree 105/2015 improve their capabilities in the safe management of all relevant processes. The operator must state in the document their commitment to implement, adopt, maintain and continuously improve their safety management system. For this reason, UnoSicurezza offers a wide range of tailored courses that meet operator needs and comply with the mandatory principle of continuous training (Legislative Decree 105/2015, art. 14, Appendix 1 of Annex B), thanks to collaboration with your HS group.

aspRspp.bannerDescription: Explore our services and contact us
aspRspp.description: Safety is not merely a theoretical topic to overlook during daily work activities. Sometimes it may seem complex because the right knowledge is missing. Other times, people think compliance ends once done, but that is a serious mistake. Safety requires continuous maintenance and improvement in line with legal requirements. For this reason, UnoSicurezza helps companies provide:
aspRspp.aspp: (Worker in charge of prevention and protection service)
aspRspp.rspp: (Manager in charge of prevention and protection service)

dvr.bannerDescription: Drafting and updating of the Risk Assessment Document
dvr.description: The Risk Assessment Document (DVR). We provide complete services for risk assessment, document drafting, staff training and periodic updates in accordance with Legislative Decree 81/2008.

emergency.descriptionLead: For compliance with article 18, paragraph 1, letter t), the employer:
emergency.descriptionBody: Must adopt necessary measures for fire prevention and workplace evacuation, as well as for serious and immediate danger, according to article 43. These measures must be adequate:
obligations: to the nature of the activity
to the size of the company or production unit
to the number of people present
emergency.descriptionCta: At UnoSicurezza, we can help you with this!

lightning.bannerDescription: Adapt your structure to regulations: assess lightning risk.
lightning.description: Art. 17 of Legislative Decree 81/08 defines non-delegable employer duties: the employer cannot delegate the assessment of all risks and the related preparation of the document required by article 28, as well as compliance with CEI standards. Among all risks is also the risk that the building may be exposed to lightning discharges. At UnoSicurezza, we can help you with this!

legionella.bannerDescription: Legionella risk assessment and control plans
legionella.paragraph1: We carry out sampling and analysis at selected points of the water system, with official test reports and comparison against parameter limit values provided by Legislative Decree 18/2023 for Legionella determination. Results are delivered clearly and comprehensively.
legionella.paragraph2: At UnoSicurezza, we help our partners avoid hidden risks often underestimated in daily operations. One of the most overlooked risks is Legionella bacteria: a microorganism that, if not identified and managed, can cause serious health issues and major liabilities for employers.
legionella.paragraph3: Entrust us with managing this critical issue.
specialItems: Sampling in points with higher probability of bacterial proliferation
Laboratory analysis with comparison to limits required by current regulations
Legionella risk assessment and preparation of related documentation

radon.bannerDescription: Measurements and assessments of radon gas in workplaces
radon.description: Underground and semi-underground workplaces located in priority areas? Radon risk assessment in workplaces, under Legislative Decree 101/2020, is mandatory for employers to protect workers' health. Risk is assessed by measuring radon concentration in air, expressed in Bq/m3. The UnoSicurezza team provides:

drinkingWater.bannerDescription: Water potability analysis for condominiums, homes and companies
drinkingWater.paragraph1: The quality and safety of water intended for human consumption in Italy are regulated by Legislative Decree 18/2023, implementing European Directive 2020/2184. This regulation defines limit values for chemical and microbiological parameters required to ensure water potability.
drinkingWater.paragraph2: Periodic verification of water compliance is fundamental not only to protect people's health, but also to meet obligations for condominium administrators and companies.
drinkingWater.paragraph3: We offer a complete sampling and laboratory analysis service, including:
drinkingWater.sampleAtHome: Home sampling - one of our specialized technicians visits the indicated sampling point (tap or other accessible point).
drinkingWater.fullAnalysisLead: Complete potability analysis (Legislative Decree 18/2023) - compliance verification for microbiological, chemical and indicator parameters required by law, with determination of over 60 parameters, including:
parameterItems: coliform bacteria, Escherichia coli, intestinal enterococci, Clostridium perfringens;
heavy metals (lead, arsenic, mercury, cadmium, nickel, chromium);
organic and inorganic contaminants (nitrates, nitrites, PFAS, trihalomethanes, polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons, pesticides);
indicator parameters (pH, turbidity, hardness, conductivity, odor, color, taste).
drinkingWater.reportNote: At the end of the analyses, an official test report is issued, showing detected values and comparison against limits set by Legislative Decree 18/2023.

laboratory.bannerDescription: We provide complete laboratory analysis services to ensure quality, safety and compliance of products and environments. Through certified methods, we analyze samples of water, air, waste and materials to identify possible contamination and ensure compliance with current regulations.
laboratory.intro: Our goal is to transform regulatory obligations into prevention and value enhancement tools, offering integrated solutions for environmental protection.

sections.title: Waste management
items: Correct waste management is a central element of environmental sustainability.
Leaching tests for reuse or plant disposal.

sections.title: Water
sections.description: Water discharges and groundwater monitoring must comply with precise requirements. We handle:
items: Correct waste management is a central element of environmental safety.
Monitoring through piezometers and artisanal wells for quarries, treatment plants and industrial companies.

sections.title: Atmospheric emissions
sections.description: Industrial and artisanal emissions are regulated by strict standards. Our services include:
items: Identification of processes subject to regulations;
Determination of main pollutants (dust, metals, acids, VOCs, SOx, NOx, CO, CO2, dioxins).

sections.title: Asbestos
sections.description: For asbestos risk management we offer:
items: Assessment of material condition with certified algorithms;
Sampling and qualitative/quantitative analyses with FT-IR and XRD techniques;
Determination of main pollutants (dust, metals, acids, VOCs, SOx, NOx, CO, CO2, dioxins).
Monitoring of airborne fibers (MOCF and SEM).

building.bannerDescription: Measurements and assessments of radon gas in workplaces
building.description: The UnoSicurezza team offers building management and condominium administration services to support building owners/managers who want to optimize processes related to:
building.cta: Rely on us and contact us!

rentri.paragraph1: RENTRI is the tool through which the Ministry of Environment and Energy Security structures the waste traceability system and enables digitization of documents related to waste movement and transport.
listItems: provide public administration with a continuous flow of data and information on waste movement, supporting environmental policies and regional planning;
support control authorities in preventing and combating illegal waste management by facilitating verification through digital documents;
fulfill obligations for companies quickly and easily by streamlining procedures, also through digital transition support tools made available by the Ministry;
reduce time for transmitting data needed for reporting and monitoring achievement of European recovery and recycling targets;
digitally manage millions of paper documents.
rentri.paragraph3: Rely on UnoSicurezza, a company that supports its partners step by step in fulfilling their obligations.

videoAuthorization.bannerDescription: Do you have a video surveillance/satellite localization system that records and includes employees?
videoAuthorization.description: The use of audiovisual systems and other tools that may enable remote monitoring of workers' activities is permitted only for organizational and production needs, workplace safety and protection of company assets (art. 4, paragraph 1, law no. 300/1970), except tools used for work performance (e.g. computers, phones, tablets) or for access/presence detection (badge readers), pursuant to art. 4, paragraph 2, law no. 300/1970.

medicalCompetent.bannerTitle: Plant authorization management and appointment of the competent doctor
medicalCompetent.bannerDescription: Do you have a company with one or more employees? Do you want to be sure you comply with all obligations for workers' health protection?
medicalCompetent.description: Appointment of the competent doctor is mandatory under Legislative Decree 81/08, especially articles 18 and 41, and is fundamental for protecting workers' health. The competent doctor collaborates in risk assessment, carries out health surveillance and contributes to prevention of occupational diseases and injuries, ensuring company compliance with current regulations.

medicalVisits.bannerDescription: Do you have a company with one or more employees? Do you want to be sure you have not missed any obligation for employee health protection?
medicalVisits.description: Appointment of the competent doctor is mandatory under Legislative Decree 81/08, especially articles 18 and 41, and is fundamental for protecting workers' health. The competent doctor collaborates in risk assessment, carries out health surveillance and contributes to prevention of occupational diseases and injuries, ensuring company compliance with current regulations.

occupationalLab.bannerDescription: Do you have a company with one or more employees? Do you want to be sure you have not missed any obligation for employee health protection?
occupationalLab.description: In some specific cases, depending on the role performed, laboratory analyses are required to complete fitness-for-work assessment. These checks, required by Legislative Decree 81/08, verify that workers are in optimal physical condition to carry out activities safely. This is not only a legal requirement, but a concrete prevention and protection measure designed to safeguard staff wellbeing and maintain high safety standards within the company.

condominium.bannerDescription: Do you manage buildings and want full support for condominium compliance and administration?
condominium.description: We support condominium managers and property owners with practical and regulatory services aimed at improving management efficiency, documentation control, safety obligations and organizational continuity. Our approach helps reduce operational burden while keeping every process aligned with regulations.

form.title: Request information
form.subtitle: Fill in the form to request information about the {{service}} service.
form.privacyText: The undersigned authorizes processing of personal data in compliance with current personal data protection laws and, in particular, Regulation (EU) 2016/679, Legislative Decree no. 196 of 30/06/2003 and subsequent amendments and integrations, as last amended by Legislative Decree no. 101 of 10/08/2018, and further authorizes the recipient to process data for provision of requested services.

chiSiamo.intro: We are a group of professionals dealing with property management, training, safety and health for companies and condominiums.
chiSiamo.objectiveLabel: Our goal is to make regulatory compliance easier and help our clients work and live in safer, more organized environments.
chiSiamo.formazioneDesc: we offer clear and practical courses, also online, thanks to an easy-to-use platform designed for workers, managers and training institutions.
chiSiamo.sicurezzaDesc: we support companies and condominiums with document compliance, mandatory courses, emergency plans and inspections to ensure increasingly safe workplaces in line with regulations.
chiSiamo.saluteDesc: we carry out laboratory analyses to prevent risks, provide support in occupational medicine and protect people's health.
chiSiamo.tagline: Training and safety, the engine for a calmer and more successful future.
chiSiamo.missionDesc: Our mission is to support micro, small, medium and large enterprises through targeted training paths, strategic consulting services and efficient management of document compliance. We believe in continuous growth, process simplification and skills development.

mission.card1Desc: Workplace safety is at the center of everything we do, with the goal of creating safer work environments.
mission.card2Desc: We use reliable and proven systems to offer quality, accessible and functional training paths.
mission.card3Desc: Every solution is designed around the specific needs of the client, ensuring concrete results.
mission.card4Desc: Quality standards in every course, with cutting-edge teaching methodologies.

pillars.card1Desc: We are constantly dedicated to continuous updates in compliance with current regulations.
pillars.card2Desc: An LMS platform designed to offer simple, effective and always up-to-date training paths in line with current regulations.
pillars.card3Desc: A single platform that includes diversified courses and personalized training paths, designed for every need.

workWithUs.heroDescription: The platform is available in cloud mode according to security, reliability and data protection standards. Find out how to collaborate with us for training, safety and professionals.

section1.title: For Training Entities
section1.description: We provide a dedicated space on our platform where you can:
section1.bullet1: offer your courses on health and safety at work
section1.bullet2: manage users and training paths independently
section1.bottomText: A practical and professional solution to enhance your services and ensure clients always have up-to-date and certified mandatory training.
section1.buttonText: Contact us and we'll take care of the rest!

section2.title: For Professionals
section2.description: If you work in the field of health and safety at work, join our network and offer your services in collaboration with us.
section2.subText: You will have the opportunity to:
section2.bullet1: Trainers and instructors who want to create their own online school capable of generating immediate revenue.
section2.bullet2: A simple, intuitive platform with professional tools for creating online courses and training.
section2.bottomText: A collaboration that allows you to grow professionally and give greater completeness to your services.

section3.title: Benefits of collaboration
section3.description: Our platform allows you to focus on training content while we take care of the technology and regulatory compliance.
section3.benefit1Desc: Immediate access to our advanced LMS platform without development costs.
section3.benefit2Desc: Total and centralized management of every aspect: courses, reports and personal area in one interface.
section3.benefit3Desc: Ability to upload your training content in SCORM format and many other formats.
section3.benefit4Desc: Issuance of certifications compliant with Italian regulations.
section3.feature4: Download reports and training certificates with one click

section4.title: Collaboration request
section4.subtitle: Fill out the form to receive more information about the partnership
section4.descrizione: Describe your business and your goals
section4.descrizionePlaceholder: Share with us how we can build a valuable partnership together...

contactUs.heroDescription: Would you like more information about our training, safety services, or a quote? Fill out the form below or use our direct contacts. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
